case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ROBERT F CHAN

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAY-03-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, ROBERT F
